# Kuts By Lee

> Professional barber in Douglasville, Georgia (Douglas County). In-shop appointments Monday–Saturday and mobile house calls Monday–Tuesday.

## Business

- **Name:** Kuts By Lee
- **Owner:** Lee (licensed barber, 5+ years experience)
- **Website:** https://kutsbylee.com/
- **Booking:** https://calendly.com/cutitoutlee/30min

## Location & service area

- **Primary city:** Douglasville, GA 30135
- **County:** Douglas County, Georgia
- **Also serves:** Villa Rica, Lithia Springs, Austell, Powder Springs, Fairburn, Winston, and nearby west-metro Atlanta communities
- **Coordinates:** 33.7515, -84.7477

## Contact

- **Phone:** (404) 820-4998 — tel:+14048204998
- **Email:** cutitoutlee@gmail.com

## Hours

- **In-shop:** Monday–Saturday, 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM
- **House calls:** Monday & Tuesday (by appointment; +$20 travel fee, may vary outside Douglas County)

## Services & pricing (USD)

| Service | Price |
|---------|------:|
| Kut (fade, taper, classic) | $30 |
| Specialty Kut | $35 |
| Line-Up | $20 |
| Beard Line-Up | $20 |
| Kut + Beard | $35 |
| Specialty Kut + Beard | $40 |
| House Call (add-on travel) | +$20 |
| Steam Towel Add-On | +$10 |
| Shampoo Add-On | +$20 |

## Specialties

Fades, tapers, skin fades, 360 waves, line-ups, beard shaping, specialty designs, mohawks, dread maintenance, twists, razor finishes, steam towel, shampoo add-ons, mobile barber house calls.
